post.description: This route is only available for Evana's identity provider to validate username of password. Requesting this route will not lead to an user access token!

200.description: Authentication was successful and the user object is provided

post.description: This route will return a user access token.

200.description: Authentication was successful and the access token is provided

post.description: With this route you have the possibility to upload files to the EVANA system.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Contains a user email address for additional user context in combination with a service access token. This is required in case of a service request.

get.description: With this route you have the possibility to download files to the EVANA system.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID

put.summary: Upload a new version of the specified binary file
put.description: With this route, you have the possibility to update files which were already uploaded to the EVANA system. The user/service should has FILE_UPDATE_CONTENT permission.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: (__WIP__) Contains a user email address for additional user context in combination with a service access token. This is required in case of a service request.

delete.description: With this route, you have the possibility to delete files which were already uploaded to the EVANA system.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID.

get.summary: Get the data model content (all keys) of the document
get.description: With this route you get all extracted values of the analysis relatet to the selected document.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID.

get.summary: Get the elements assigned to the document
get.description: With this route you get all the elements that belong to the selected document.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID.

200.description: File's master data was successfully fetched

put.summary: Update the specified element assigned to the document
put.description: With this route you can add elements to the selected document.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID.

parameters.name: masterDataId
parameters.description: Please enter the required master data Id

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: (__WIP__) Contains a user email address for additional user context in combination with a service access token. This is required in case of a service request.

put.summary: Update the document type of a document.
put.description:
With this route you can update/change the document type of a document.
Important note: Be aware that the data model content of the document will be deleted!

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID.

parameters.name: fileTypeId
parameters.description: Please enter the required file type Id

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: (__WIP__) Contains a user email address for additional user context in combination with a service access token. This is required in case of a service request.

get.summary: Get meta data of a document (and binary file)
get.description: With this route you can retrieve all available metadata of a document (and binary file).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID.

200.description: File's meta data was successfully fetched

get.summary: Get the URL to directly access the document in Evana360
get.description: With this route you can retrieve a deep link (URL) to a file within the EVANA system.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID.

get.summary: Get the thumbnail of the document
get.description: This route allows you to retrieve a thumbnail of a document (and binary file).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID.

get.summary: Get Evana360's security classification attached to the document
get.description: This route allows you to retrieve security classification assigned to a document.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Please enter the required file ID.

204.description: No Content: The request was successfull, but the file does not have a Security Class set.

get.description: With this route you can either query all structures or search for specific structures by filtering.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Filter by structure's path. path is a list of ids separated by comma, e.g 5f2277e14e62533d50999cb5,5f2277e14e62533d50999cb7

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: limit of structures to be retrieved per page

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: order of the result descending or ascending

parameters.name: showAdjacentStructuresOnly
parameters.description: search for results in adjacent structures only

post.description: With this route you can create new structures. Please pay attention to the order of the given parameters.

patch.summary: Update the value of a key in a data model

get.description: With this route you can either query all elements or search for specific elements by filtering.

parameters.name: tree
parameters.description: get dimensions from the current selected structure and all underlying structures.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: if set to true the API baseDataSearch looks for datamodel values (included in a dimension) to filter dimensions with these values. If set to false the API looks only for the name of a dimension.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: order of the result descending or ascending

post.description: With this route, you can create new elements, for example, to assign them to structures or documents afterwards.

patch.description: With this route, you can update specified elements. You can change the name of an element and/or assign the element to another data model.

get.summary: Get the element's key-value pairs related to a data model
get.description: This route allows you to query all elements and their key-value pairs that have been assigned to a specific data model.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Set language for results (de as default)

patch.summary: Update a element's key-value pairs related to a data model

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Set language for results (de as default)

get.description: This route allows you to query a specific data model by its ID.

post.summary: Add a new key to the specified data model to create a customer-specific data model by extending an existing one
post.description: This route allows you to add a new key to the specified data model to create a customer-specific data model by extending an existing one

get.description: This route delivers all global data models that are not customer-specific.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: order of the result descending or ascending

get.description: With this route you can query all document types that exist in the EVANA system. In addition, you receive their internal ID, the associated data model and much more.

parameters.name: email

202.description: Could not create the specified user. Due to the Azure B2C integration, an error is delivered as 202.

204.description: Successfully updated the users with specified user ID

202.description: Could not find the specified user. Due to the Azure B2C integration, an error is delivered as 202.

get.summary: Get the user accordingly to the specified ID or email

parameters.name: id
parameters.description:
String ID based on the ID. Either an internal ID, an email or an OpenID.
If the id parameter has an email format, the user is searched via the email property.
If the id parameter is not an email, and the isExternalID is false, then the user is searched via the id property.
If the parameter is not an email, and the isExternalID is true, then the user is searched based on the openID property.

parameters.name: isExternalID
parameters.description:
The default value is true.
Set this to true if you want to retrieve the User by its EVANA-external ID, which is only present if you have SSO setup for the EVANA platform.
Set this to false, if you want to retrieve the User by its EVANA ID, e.g. the one referenced in createdBy or uploadedBy fields.

200.description: Found an user based on the specified ID
